General.Name: China Singyes New Materials Holdings Ltd
General.Description: China Shuifa Singyes New Materials Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and installation of indium tin oxide films and related downstream products in Czech Republic, Mainland China and internationally. It offers smart polymer-dispersed liquid crystals, and light emitting diodes display and projection systems. The company also manufactures, sells, and installs photovoltaic products. It serves touch-screen device manufacturers, construction companies, contractors of developers, and commercial users. The company was formerly known as China Singyes New Materials Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Shuifa Singyes New Materials Holdings Limited in July 2024. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China. China Shuifa Singyes New Materials Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Top Access Management Limited.

3.Name: Ms. Qin  Wu
3.Title: Head of the Research & Development of Zhuhai New Materials
